How it works

Three steps to a well-behaved dog

01
💬

Message Emma

Open WhatsApp and say hi. Tell Emma your dog's name, breed, and what behaviour you're struggling with. No forms. No signups.

02
🧠

Get instant advice

Emma replies in seconds with specific, personalised steps. Real expert guidance — built around your exact dog and situation.

03
🏆

See real results

Train with Emma guiding every step. She remembers your dog and builds on each session. Progress, not repetition.

What Emma solves

Whatever your dog does — Emma can help

🗣️

Barking

Excessive barking at strangers, other dogs, or when left alone.

🦮

Leash Pulling

Dogs that drag you on walks and won't stay by your side.

🦷

Biting & Nipping

Puppies and adults that bite hands, clothes, or children.

😰

Anxiety

Separation anxiety, fear of noise, or general nervousness.

🚀

Jumping

Dogs that jump on guests, family members, or strangers.

📍

Recall

Dogs that won't come back when called off leash.

🚽

Potty Training

Puppies or rescues that haven't mastered house training.

😤

Aggression

Resource guarding, dog-to-dog, or territorial behaviour.

🐾
Emma – Dog Trainer
online
Hey! I'm Emma 🐾 What's your dog's name and what's the main issue?
Rocky won't stop barking at the door
Classic territorial barking! Say "quiet" once calmly the moment Rocky barks — don't repeat it. Wait for even 2 seconds of silence, then reward immediately. You're teaching that quiet = treat 🎯
What if he starts again right away?
Turn your back and ignore completely — even eye contact counts as attention. Once quiet, reward. Most dogs crack within 10–15 consistent repetitions. You've got this! 💪

FAQ

Got questions? We've got answers.

Is Emma a real trainer or AI?

Emma is powered by AI trained on professional dog training methods. Expert-level, personalised advice — available any time, day or night.

Do I need to download an app?

Nope. Emma lives on WhatsApp, which you already have. Just message the number and you're training within seconds.

What issues can Emma help with?

Jumping, pulling, barking, biting, anxiety, recall, potty training, aggression, socialisation — if your dog does it, Emma can help.

Does Emma remember my dog?

Yes! Emma stores your dog's name, breed, age and previous sessions. Every conversation builds on the last one.

How do I upgrade after the free trial?

After 3 free questions, Emma sends a payment link directly in WhatsApp. Choose your plan and you're back chatting in minutes.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes — monthly plans cancel anytime. The $26.99 Custom Training Plan is one-time and never auto-renews.
